EXILED_PRINCE.name: The Exiled Prince
EXILED_PRINCE.select_text: A strategist who wins by command, setup, and sacrifice.

COMPEL.name: Compel
COMPEL.description: Enemy deals reduced attack damage next turn. Can spend Influence to increase reduction.

BLACK_SEAL.name: Black Seal
BLACK_SEAL.flavor: A vow to command fate itself.
BLACK_SEAL.description: At combat start, gain 1 Influence. Your first Order each combat costs 1 less Influence.

keywords.Influence: A secondary resource used for command effects.
keywords.Rebellion: A high-risk state that boosts Orders with upkeep penalties.
